zh: 了解孩子的想法及需要、
en: so you understand their thoughts and needs.

zh: 也訓練孩子表達的能力、
更能清楚孩子在幼兒園裡的情形、
en: and helps you know how they're doing in preschool.
Stay in regular contact with their teachers,
learning about various aspects of their performance.
Encourage them at the right moments,

zh: 也避免偏差行為的產生、
父母要與孩子一同成長、
en: Parents must grow alongside their children.

zh: 多閱讀管教孩子方面的書籍或請教專家、
en: Reading parenting books or consulting experts
